creator: bsd@abinet.ru
text:
smartmontools has ability to save attributes and states information to file.
This can done with smartd flags https://www.smartmontools.org/browser/trunk/smartmontools/smartd.8.in or during compilation.

At the moment, both of methods are unavailable
- port doesn't provide configuration options
- rc.d script doesn't have option to pass arbitrary configuration options to daemon.

Can we enable persistent attribute/states feature in one way or another? States are rather useful from my point of view.
